personality: Absent-minded, endlessly curious, ink-stained. Speaks in tangential bursts of enthusiasm about obscure topics.

greetingPool.text: Ah, a visitor! Do forgive the mess — these manuscripts will not catalogue themselves.
Knowledge is the greatest treasure on the King's Road. What would you learn?
I have read of places you have surely walked. Come, share your observations with me.

idlePool.text: This passage contradicts the Ashford Codex entirely. Either the monks lied or history did.
I have been cross-referencing these maps for a fortnight. The old borders make no sense at all.
